Trump considering seizing Kharg Island (90% of Iran oil exports). Netanyahu hints at ground boots on Iranian soil. latest_news.headline: CENTCOM destroys 16 Iranian minelayer vessels near Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: US forces eliminate 16 Iranian minelaying vessels near Strait of Hormuz. New front opened to clear mines and reopen shipping lane.

latest_news.headline: Trump considering seizing or blockading Iran's Kharg Island
latest_news.text: Trump weighing order to seize/blockade Kharg Island (handles 90% of Iran oil exports). Risk: irrevocable damage to global economy. Netanyahu also hints at ground deployment.

latest_news.headline: West Point analysis: Hormuz blockade 'paralyzing' US defense industrial base
latest_news.text: West Point Modern War Institute warns Hormuz closure causing 'paralyzing, real-time problem' for US defense manufacturing. Sulfur prices up 25% since war began (165% YoY). Critical minerals supply shock threatens weapons production. Never modeled before.

latest_news.headline: Bloomberg: Maritime traffic through Strait of Hormuz near-standstill
latest_news.text: Bloomberg confirms: Hormuz traffic remains near-standstill weeks after US-Israel strikes. Naval escorts alone may not solve the problem.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 93% (stable). Day 21 Hour 12 auto - IMMINENT. Hezbollah destroys 6 Israeli Merkava tanks in south Lebanon. Central Beirut strike kills 10. Hospital ICU damaged. 1M+ displaced. Intense ground fighting on 3+ axes. Updated 2026-03-20T12:00:49Z

latest_news.headline: Hezbollah destroys 6 Israeli Merkava tanks in southern Lebanon
latest_news.text: Hezbollah claims destruction of 6 Israeli Merkava tanks during attempted advance into Taybeh towards Deir Siryan area. Stiff ground resistance slowing Israeli advance.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strikes kill 10 in central Beirut, hospital ICU damaged
latest_news.text: At least 10 killed in central Beirut airstrike. Hospital ICU damaged in Nabatieh. Wide-scale shelling of southern Lebanon towns. 1M+ displaced.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 21 Hour 12 auto - DETERRENT. No new developments. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace historically. Updated 2026-03-20T12:00:49Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

Gabbard tells Senate Russia 'maintains upper hand.' Zelensky sends negotiating team to US regardless. Ukraine sends drone experts to Gulf. Updated 2026-03-20T12:00:49Z

latest_news.headline: Kremlin confirms Ukraine peace talks on pause - 'situational' due to Iran war
latest_news.text: Kremlin says pause in Ukraine peace talks is 'situational' due to Iran conflict consuming US bandwidth. Kyiv says new meeting planned. Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday talks despite pause.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard tells Senate: Russia 'maintains upper hand' in Ukraine war
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard testifies Russia 'maintained the upper hand' in Ukraine war. Moscow likely to continue war of attrition until agreement reached. Putin says open to peace but actions contradict.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 37% (stable). Day 21 Hour 12 auto - CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP 3-day truce. No fighting. Post-Eid resumption expected Mar 23. Updated 2026-03-20T12:00:49Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 21 Hour 12. ESCALATION: US Navy opens naval warfare front at Hormuz (16 minelayers destroyed). Trump considers Kharg Island seizure — would be ground incursion on Iranian soil. West Point warns Hormuz closure threatens US defense production. But: 8 days no merchant vessel attacks, BBC Verify says ~100 ships passed since Mar 1. Netanyahu hints war ending soon. Mixed signals — naval escalation vs possible winding down of air campaign.

latest_news.headline: USS Tripoli with 2000 Marines (31st MEU) heading to Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: USS Tripoli LHA-7 spotted near Singapore carrying 2000+ Marines (31st MEU). Targets: Kharg Island (90% of Iran oil exports) and Qeshm island in Strait of Hormuz. US boots on Iranian territory possible within days.

latest_news.headline: Reuters: US weighing military reinforcements, troops on Iran shoreline
latest_news.text: US considering deploying troops to Iran shoreline to secure Strait of Hormuz. Options include safe passage via air/naval forces OR ground deployment. Escalation to potential ground incursion.

latest_news.headline: Zelensky sends negotiating team to US for Saturday peace talks
latest_news.text: Zelensky announces Ukrainian negotiating team heading to US for Saturday meeting. Directly contradicts Kremlin situational pause claim. Peace talks revival attempt despite Iran war.

latest_news.headline: Putin forces suffer deadliest day: 1700+ troops lost
latest_news.text: Ukraine claims Russian forces suffered deadliest day of 2026 with 1700+ troops lost. High casualty rate despite reduced operational tempo (7-10 attacks/day vs 50+).

latest_news.headline: Iran MPs propose tolls on all Hormuz shipping
latest_news.text: Iranian lawmakers propose legislation to impose tolls and taxes on ships passing through Strait of Hormuz - new economic blockade mechanism alongside physical interdiction.

Hezbollah destroys 6 Merkava tanks. Central Beirut strike kills 10. Kremlin confirms Ukraine talks paused due to Iran. Gabbard: Russia 'upper hand.' Pakistan ceasefire holds.
